all.en: Your monthly account statement is now available for review.
all.zh: 您的月度對帳單現已可供查閱。

all.en: The statement period covers transactions from April first to thirtieth.
all.zh: 對帳期間涵蓋四月一日至三十日之交易。

all.en: You can access the document through our secure online banking portal.
all.zh: 您可透過我們的安全網路銀行入口取得文件。

all.en: Paper statements are no longer mailed by default to customers.
all.zh: 本行已不再預設寄送紙本對帳單。

all.en: Please log in using your registered username and password.
all.zh: 請使用您註冊之帳號與密碼登入。

all.en: Multifactor authentication is required for all account holders.
all.zh: 所有帳戶持有人均須通過多因素身分驗證。

all.en: Your opening balance for the period was twelve thousand dollars.
all.zh: 本期之期初餘額為一萬二千美元。

all.en: Total deposits this month amounted to eight thousand seven hundred dollars.
all.zh: 本月存款總計為八千七百美元。

all.en: Total withdrawals and payments reached five thousand four hundred dollars.
all.zh: 本月提款與付款合計為五千四百美元。

all.en: Your ending balance as of the cutoff date was fifteen thousand three hundred.
all.zh: 截止日之期末餘額為一萬五千三百美元。

all.en: Service charges for the month total nine dollars and ninety nine cents.
all.zh: 本月服務費合計為九點九九美元。

all.en: Interest earned on savings products is shown in a separate section.
all.zh: 儲蓄商品所獲利息列示於獨立區塊。

all.en: Pending transactions are not yet reflected in the official statement.
all.zh: 未結算交易尚未反映於正式對帳單。

all.en: Please review every line item carefully for accuracy.
all.zh: 請逐筆仔細核對每項明細之正確性。

all.en: Report any unauthorized activity within sixty days of statement issuance.
all.zh: 如發現未授權之活動，請於對帳單寄發後六十天內通報。

all.en: Suspicious charges should be flagged using the dispute form online.
all.zh: 可疑款項請透過線上爭議表單標記。

all.en: Our fraud team is available around the clock for urgent cases.
all.zh: 本行詐欺防制團隊全天候為緊急個案服務。

all.en: You may download statements in either PDF or CSV format.
all.zh: 您可下載PDF或CSV格式之對帳單檔案。

all.en: Historical statements remain accessible for the past seven years.
all.zh: 過去七年之歷史對帳單均可查閱。

all.en: Email alerts can be configured for low balance thresholds.
all.zh: 可設定電子郵件提醒以監控低額度門檻。

all.en: Mobile app notifications provide real time transaction updates.
all.zh: 行動應用程式可即時推播交易通知。

all.en: Thank you for banking with us throughout this statement period.
all.zh: 感謝您本期間持續使用本行服務。
